title: 🚀 Calling marketing managers who use email marketing campaigns 🚀

posts.author: Inbaltal (Inbal Tal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community!

I’m Inbal, a product manager on the monday CRM team.

We’re developing a new marketing campaigns platform to take your campaigns to the next level. To ensure we create the best tool for your needs, we’re looking for experienced marketers to join us as design partners and alpha users.

If you’re passionate about optimizing email marketing strategies and want to shape the future of this product with us, We’d love to chat! Please fill out the form below if you’re interested, and We’ll get back to you as soon as possible. Let’s make something great together!

Form link: Email marketing campaigns design partners and alpha users

posts.author: juanzevallos (Juan Jose)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is amazing!!
Thanks for sharing, will try it!
